---
title: "test_phase_88_edge_cases.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_phase_88_edge_cases.py"
loc: 50
complexity: 4
logic_score: 3.63
style_score: 3.24
intel_score: 3.00
overall_score: 3.00
---

## Intent
The `test_phase_88_edge_cases.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestPhase88EdgeCases, setUp, tearDown, test_regression_and_failure_isolation, test_domination_cap. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestPhase88EdgeCases, setUp, tearDown, test_regression_and_failure_isolation, test_domination_cap. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.2/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [sqlite3](file://sqlite3)
- [json](file://json)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.campaign_updater](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.campaign_updater)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.models](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.models)

### Exports
- `TestPhase88EdgeCases`
- `setUp`
- `tearDown`
- `test_regression_and_failure_isolation`
- `test_domination_cap`
